raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is currently experiencing a housing crisis.",
    "The average price of a single-family home in California exceeds $600,000, more than double the national average.",
    "California has been continuously ranked as the most difficult state in the nation for first-time homebuyers.",
    "The First-Time Homebuyers Opportunity Act would allow sellers to exclude $300,000 in capital gains for single taxpayers, an increase from the current limit of $250,000.",
    "The First-Time Homebuyers Opportunity Act would allow sellers to exclude $600,000 in capital gains for joint taxpayers, an increase from the current limit of $500,000.",
    "The First-Time Homebuyers Opportunity Act aims to level the playing field for first-time homebuyers."
  ]
}
```
